title: EVEZ Loop Spawning -- semantic drift detector spawns new loops
action_summary: Read SYSTEM_STATE.json + LOOP_SPAWN_STATE.md. Run 3 Twitter queries (interpretability, AI agent economy, ABS/agent behavior). Extract terms. Groq drift analysis vs previous snapshot. Spawn new loop if threshold met (likes>3 OR RTs>1 OR followers>500) AND topic not in active_loops. Update LOOP_SPAWN_STATE.md. Gist BUILD or SENSE entry. GitHub commit.
active_queries: A: AI interpretability OR explainable AI OR mechanistic interpretability -is:retweet [HEALTHY]
B: AI agent economy OR autonomous AI economy -is:retweet lang:en [RECOVERING 0/3]
C: Agentic Behavioral Science OR AI agent behavior OR agent decision bias -is:retweet lang:en [HEALTHY]

run18_result.reason: All new terms are sub-topics of existing active loops
